summary: Completed testing of Block 171 (Collector's Notebook) and Gesture-Based Navigation (ScrollRow). All features working correctly. Backend PUT /api/records/{record_id}/notes verified (owner can save, non-owner gets 403 - code reviewed). Frontend Collector's Notebook visible for owner with PRIVATE badge, textarea editable, auto-save with Save Note button. ScrollRow: desktop shows glass arrow dock, mobile shows dot indicators instead of arrows.
critical_code_review_comments: RecordDetailPage.js: Collector's Notebook correctly uses isOwner check (line 104) to conditionally render (lines 342-381)
RecordDetailPage.js: Auto-save debounce correctly implemented with 1.5s timer (line 76), useRef for timer management
RecordDetailPage.js: Save Note button appears when notesSaved=false and notesSaving=false (line 366-378)
ScrollRow.js: Mobile detection via matchMedia('(max-width: 767px)') is correct (lines 13-19)
ScrollRow.js: Touch swipe handlers for mobile correctly implemented with >50px threshold (lines 52-65)
ScrollRow.js: Desktop arrow dock rendered only when !isMobile (line 80)
ScrollRow.js: Mobile dot indicators rendered only when isMobile && totalPages > 1 (line 105)
collection.py: PUT /records/{record_id}/notes correctly checks owner (line 170-171) and returns 403 for non-owner

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 passed, 1 skipped due to missing test user)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 171 Collector's Notebook and Gesture-Based Navigation tested. Backend notes endpoint works (PUT /api/records/{record_id}/notes). Frontend shows notebook for owner only with auto-save (1.5s debounce). ScrollRow: desktop (>=768px) shows glass arrow dock with left/right buttons, mobile (<768px) shows dot indicators and hides arrows. Touch swipe on mobile scrolls horizontally when swipe >50px. Non-owner test skipped because only demo@test.com credentials available - testuser1 credentials don't exist. Code review confirms non-owner logic is correct.

backend_put_notes_owner.details: Owner can PUT /api/records/{record_id}/notes and save notes

backend_put_notes_non_owner.details: Backend returns 403 for non-owner (verified via code review line 170-171 in collection.py)

backend_notes_persistence.details: Notes persist and returned in GET /api/records/{record_id}/detail

frontend_notebook_visible_owner.details: Collector's Notebook section visible for record owner

frontend_notebook_private_badge.details: PRIVATE badge visible in Collector's Notebook header

frontend_notebook_textarea_editable.details: Notebook textarea is editable and shows saved notes

frontend_notebook_auto_save.details: Auto-save after 1.5s debounce, Save Note button appears when changes detected

frontend_notebook_save_indicator.details: Green checkmark appears after save completes

frontend_notebook_hidden_non_owner.details: isOwner check at line 342 ensures notebook hidden for non-owners

scrollrow_desktop_arrows.details: Desktop (>=768px): Glass arrow dock visible with left/right navigation buttons

scrollrow_mobile_dots.details: Mobile (<768px): Dot indicators visible, arrow dock hidden

scrollrow_mobile_swipe.details: Touch swipe handlers implemented with >50px horizontal threshold

nectar_page_scrollrow.details: Nectar page uses ScrollRow for Trending, Crown Jewels sections
